tips.title: The Time Travel Rule
tips.description: Think of tenses as time travel! Past is behind you, Present is now, Future is ahead.

tips.title: The '-ed' Magic
tips.description: Most regular verbs in Simple Past add '-ed': walk → walked, play → played

tips.title: The '-ing' Signal
tips.description: When you see '-ing' with is/am/are, it's Present Continuous. With was/were, it's Past Continuous!

tips.title: Will Power
tips.description: 'Will' always signals future tense. It's your crystal ball word!

tips.title: The Perfect has 'Have'
tips.description: Perfect tenses always use 'have/has/had'. Has = he/she/it, Have = I/you/we/they

tips.title: Subject-Verb Agreement
tips.description: In Simple Present: He/She/It takes 's' or 'es' (walks, goes). I/You/We/They don't (walk, go)

tips.title: The Before-Before Rule
tips.description: Past Perfect = action completed BEFORE another past action. Think 'before the before'!

tips.title: Continuous = Ongoing
tips.description: All continuous tenses show ongoing/progressive action. Look for 'be' + '-ing'
